card_text:
Qwen3 14B - General instruction-tuned generative model.

Benchmarks:
- MMLU: 81.05% (5-shot)
- MMLU-Pro: 61.03% (5-shot, CoT)
- GSM8K: 92.49% (4-shot, CoT)
- MATH: 62.02% (4-shot, CoT)
- HumanEval (EvalPlus): 72.23% (0-shot)
- MBPP: 73.40% (3-shot)

128K context, multilingual (119 languages), Apache 2.0 license.
